title: dubautia plantaginea
intro: Dubautia plantaginea, also known as Hawaiian cotton or Island cotton, is a plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dubautia plantaginea include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Dubautia plantaginea can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
